entry.title: Updates Complete!/title> tag:lobot.cs.queensu.ca,2026-02-24:updates-complete-1 2026-02-24T00:00:00Z RTC is now available for groups. VSCode Updated for ai agent chat, remote desktop desktop icons and logout fix.
VSCode Github Chat Full Version Only
entry.summary: To use VS Code Github Chat Agents, use the Remote Desktop of VS Code. Extensions not supported in code-server.
